title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—CLI and Go library for pulling, running, and serving large language models locally with a built-in model registry and OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps Ollama’s REST endpoints for chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with local Ollama instances.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that adds Ollama models as LLM and embeddings providers with streaming support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, and document upload.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama offering synchronous & asynchronous APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI (built with Python) for browsing and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline code completion.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that injects an Ollama service with decorators for chat, embeddings, and model ops.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration that registers Ollama models as both generators and embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that proxies calls to a local Ollama instance with session memory.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container and exposes it for CI/CD pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC support.

title: ollama-rust-sdk
summary: Official Rust SDK maintained by the Ollama team; mirrors Go library features with async support.

title: ollama-chat-angular
summary: Angular frontend example that consumes Ollama’s OpenAI-compatible endpoint for chat completions.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library and CLI that wraps Ollama endpoints with strongly-typed models and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets server members chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library providing an OTP-compliant client for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling.
